title: Claude’s “Safety vs Autonomy” Dial Explained
summary: Keith AI explains Claude's "Safety vs Autonomy" dial, a feature that manages the tradeoff between model safety constraints and agent autonomy in permission modes. The video covers how these settings affect Claude's behavior and decision-making capabilities.
